title: Data
text:
Our Dataset
Our project utilizes a comprehensive dataset combining tourism indicators and macroeconomic variables for Northern Cyprus (TRNC) covering the period 2015–2024.

Data Sources
To ensure a robust analysis, we merged data from multiple official sources: - Tourism Statistics: Total arrivals, bednights, occupancy rates, and average length of stay were obtained from the TRNC Tourism Planning Department Statistical Yearbooks. - Macroeconomic Indicators: - Consumer Price Index (CPI) for TRNC was sourced from the TRNC Statistical Institute. - Turkey’s annual inflation rates (CPI YoY%) were retrieved from the World Bank WDI. - Exchange rates (EUR/TRY and USD/TRY) were collected from TCMB EVDS and World Bank records.


Why This Dataset?
Tourism is a cornerstone of the TRNC economy, yet it is highly vulnerable to external shocks. We chose this dataset to investigate: 1. The quantitative impact of the COVID-19 pandemic. 2. How the fluctuations in the Turkish Lira affect the attractiveness of Northern Cyprus as a destination. 3. The relationship between inflationary pressures in Turkey and visitor behavior in TRNC.


Data Preparation (Preprocessing)
The following R code (collapsible) shows how we cleaned the raw data, handled missing values for certain CPI sub-indices, and merged different tables into a single unified panel dataset for analysis.


Loading necessary library
library(tidyverse)
The code below is a simplified version of our preprocessing pipeline
(based on our 01_build_dataset.R script):
1. Loading raw data from CSVs
2. Calculating air/sea shares
3. Merging with Macroeconomic indicators
4. Saving as .RData for reproducibility
In your local environment, run ‘R/01_build_dataset.R’
to generate the ‘trnc_panel.csv’ used in the next pages.
